[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110100 3
1 1010000000 2
2 1001100000 3
3 0010010000 2
4 0000110100 3
5 1010000000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 1010010000 3
12 21 0000010000 1
23 32 0000110000 2
34 43 1001100001 4
45 54 0000001000 1
56 65 0000011000 2
67 76 0000000000 a match 6 7
70 07 1010000000 2 match 1 5

02 20 0000110010 3
13 31 1010010001 4
24 42 0000100100 2
35 53 0010010000 2 match 3
46 64 0000101101 4
57 75 0010000000 1
60 06 0000110000 2
71 17 1010000000 2 match 1 5

03 30 1011110000 5
14 41 1000000001 2
25 52 0000010000 1
36 63 0000110001 3
47 74 1000000000 1
50 05 0010010000 2 match 3
61 16 0000010001 2
72 27 0000000000 a match 6 7

04 40 1001100000 3 match 2
15 51 0010010000 2 match 3
26 62 0000110100 3 match 0 4
37 73 1010000000 2 match 1 5
